title: Ascendency Path of Storm
atAGlance: A velocity path that converts momentum into thunderous strikes and sudden repositioning.
sageNotes: Storm bearers strike like weather over exposed ridge: sudden, mobile, and difficult to pin. Their strength is momentum, turning movement into pressure before enemies can reset formation. In skirmish doctrine, a Storm adept is often first contact and final withdrawal in the same breath.
gameInformation: Best for skirmishers and gish builds. Signature effects focus on lightning riders, forced movement, and initiative control without replacing core class output.
